full_text:
Cao Ren (Zixiao) 曹仁 (子孝)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Ren (曹仁), styledZixiao (子孝), was born in Qiao County, Pei County (Bozhou City, An Hui Province). Cao Cao’s cousin. Served as Minister of War for Cao Cao. Cao Ren was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Ren lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
